query:
UPDATE scrapingLogs
SET status = 'failed', errorMessage = 'Timeout: Process did not complete within expected time'
WHERE status = 'running' 
AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, createdAt, NOW()) > 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3uDLYjDbp6rUVuo.05399e1d7c2a --database NY6jPB2PH8byUzFWqjpfhf --execute 
UPDATE scrapingLogs
SET status = 'failed', errorMessage = 'Timeout: Process did not complete within expected time'
WHERE status = 'running'
